Patient Guides

Navigating Medical Cannabis

Practical, plain-English guidance for UK patients. No jargon, no spin — just clear information to help you make informed decisions about your treatment.

Your legal rights as a UK medical cannabis patient — from driving and travel to housing and workplace protections.

Everything you need to know about becoming a medical cannabis patient in the UK — eligibility, clinics, and your first prescription.

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
